text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Needle Series—the grand stage<n>where
humans augmented by<n>acupuncture race each
other for<n>ultimate supremacy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today will be our first step towards<n>conquering
that series—the day of the<n>Bamboo Stakes.
choice_data_list: This should be the meeting place...

text_block_list.name: Mysterious Beauty
text_block_list.text: Oh! <username>, please help meee!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I knew it, I'm just notme without my charismaticMiracle Shining Sunglasses!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh, absolutely! Without them, I havenothing but worries! For a genius acupuncturist-slash-trainer like me,they're almost as important as lifeitself!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But alas! They got blown by the wind<n>into the
back of a truck, then the truck<n>carried them far,
far away, then they<n>were picked up by a stray
dog—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sadly, yes... Sniffle... Please, youmust help me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, there's still time until I<n>have to run in
the Bamboo Stakes, so<n>Sasami Anshinzawa and
I decide to<n>look for her sunglasses together.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: They're not here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Nor here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Or even here...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look! The dog underneath the<n>overpass!
That's the one!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've finally caught up to you now!<n>Return my
sunglasses at once!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
They're a family heirloom, and um...<n>also
represent the wearer's<n>determination to be a
beacon of<n>reassurance to Umamusume!
choice_data_list: Those glasses have such deep lore!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
In the Legend of the Anshinzawas... It<n>was, uh...
Yasuzaemon Anshinzawa?<n>Who said something
along those lines!<n>Probably! ♪

text_block_list.name: Stray Dog
text_block_list.text: Grrrrrowl!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Eeeeek!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Right as the stray dog poises to<n>strike, I seize the
opportunity and<n>snatch the sunglasses away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even stray dogs are no match for me<n>now... I
bask in my feeling of<n>accomplishment as I hand
the<n>sunglasses back to Sasami<n>Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Swoon... ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew, looks like we somehow made<n>it on time. ♪
Feeling ready?
choice_data_list: To tell you the truth, I'm a bit nervous...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course you would be! This is<n>where my
needles come in handy! Let<n>me give your
Courageous Challenger<n>chakra a little poke! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! It's my way of saying<n>thanks for
recovering my family<n>heirloom! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here I go! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Strangely enough, as soon as she<n>pokes me, all
feelings of doubt<n>disappear from my mind, and
an<n>abundance of power wells up in me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Wow! I really did it! I knew it was<n>worth a shot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I start towards the race track in high<n>spirits, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold on! I have something for you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she pokes me, my<n>anxiety begins to
grow in intensity. At<n>this rate, I feel like my
nervousness<n>will completely overwhelm me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: W-wait... Did that not work? It didn't?!
choice_data_list: D-don't worry, I'll win with sheer determination!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I quickly start towards the race track<n>in an
attempt to shake off the heavy<n>feeling, but...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hold on! I have something for you!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here! Take my Miracle Shining<n>Sunglasses! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you look great in them! ♪ With<n>those on,
you'll have nothing to worry<n>about!
choice_data_list: But aren't these really important to you?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
No need to hold back! We've been<n>through thick
and thin together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly why I feel confident<n>entrusting
them to you! ☆ Get out there<n>and break a leg!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The sunglasses bestowed upon me<n>imbue my
body with great strength!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I've heard stories of signature<n>racewear bringing
out the wearer's<n>inner strength, which means...
choice_data_list:
(These sunglasses must be my very own
signature racewear!)

(These sunglasses must be my very own
signature racewear!)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that Sasami Anshinzawa is<n>cheering me
on from the stands, I run<n>with all my might in
hopes of winning<n>the trophy for her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In a magnificent performance,<n><chrname>'s
trainer has crossed the<n>finish line in first place!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Like a shooting star, he's appeared<n>out of
nowhere and taken the Bamboo<n>Stakes by
storm!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Like a shooting star, she's appeared<n>out of
nowhere and taken the Bamboo<n>Stakes by
storm!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Yesss! You did it, <username>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd be able to do it, partner!<n>♪ Time to
keep winning all the way to<n>the top!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to get another pair of those<n>sunglasses
from the dollar store too! ☆
